# build-a-expense-tracker-app-with-a-react-frontend-and-a-fastapi-backend-the-backend-should-have-rest
> Generated by **VIA**

## Task
Build a expense tracker app with a React frontend and a FastAPI backend. The backend should have REST API endpoints to add an expense (title, amount, category, date), get all expenses, and delete an expense by ID. The frontend should display all expenses in a clean table, allow adding new ones via a form, and show a total amount. Include API documentation.

## Frontend
GitHub Pages

## Backend
